creator: marcus@blazingdot.com
text:
When refusing to downgrade a package, pkg reports that the current repo version is installed, instead of what is actually installed.

[root@sol /root]# pkg info | grep libdrm
libdrm-2.4.54                  Userspace interface to kernel Direct Rendering Module services

[root@sol /root]# pkg install libdrm
Updating repository catalogue
libdrm-2.4.52 already installed
